message:
fix: clog to non-existent consoles, region tree WASM init timing

Bugs fixed:
- selectOutcome called clog('outcome-console') but no #outcome-console
  element exists. Changed to console.log with LOG_PREFIX for DevTools.
- triggerCancel called clog('cancel-console') but no #cancel-console
  element exists. Changed to console.log with LOG_PREFIX for DevTools.
- regionState.init() runs at page load before WASM is available, so
  the WASM scope hierarchy was never created on first render. Added
  'regions' to autoRunMap so it re-initializes with real WASM handles
  when scrolled into view after WASM loads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
